title: senecio cryophilus
intro: Senecio cryophilus, also known as Arctic burnet, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the arctic regions of the world. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio cryophilus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Senecio cryophilus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity from certain compounds found in the plant.
